description_long: This object consists of a set of porcelain teacups and matching saucers, each adorned with delicate floral patterns in soft pastel colors. The cups are white with a glossy finish and feature a single curved handle, while the saucers have matching floral motifs around their rims. The set includes at least two cups and two saucers, with one cup placed upright on its saucer and the other cup resting on its side atop the second saucer. The floral designs appear to be hand-painted or printed, adding a decorative and elegant touch. The porcelain material gives the set a refined, smooth, and slightly translucent appearance. This type of cup and saucer set is commonly found in urban environments such as cafes, outdoor seating areas, or residential patios.
description: A porcelain teacup and saucer set with floral patterns and a glossy white finish, featuring curved handles and decorative motifs.
description_view_0: Front view showing one upright cup on a saucer and another cup resting on its side atop a second saucer, both with visible floral patterns.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the stacked arrangement of the cups and saucers, with the handles and floral designs partially visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the bottom of one cup and saucer, and the upright cup's floral interior and handle.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the backs of the cups and saucers, with the floral patterns and handles visible from a different angle.
